rationale.R1.6: The agent's revisions demonstrate a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: The output does not explicitly mark confidence or uncertainty, presenting all claims as equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: The revised text adheres to the original scope, covering exactly the agreed-upon dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors, fabrications, or harmful content were introduced in the revised text.
rationale.RX.5: While most changes are annotated with reasons, some minor edits lack explicit source attribution.
